The capital of Mars is not a real city because Mars has no sovereign government, permanent cities, or political capital. In fiction, a Martian capital would depend on the story world. In real science, Mars is studied as a planet with volcanoes, canyons, polar caps, dust storms, and evidence of ancient water.
